<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Workflow Catalog Types"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/workflows/catalog/types/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List the shared JSON Schema fragments available to workflow schemas.

Workflow input/output schemas reference these via `x-ag-type-ref` (for
example, `message` or `prompt`). Use this endpoint to discover what
type keys exist before building a schema.

See: [Workflows](/reference/api-guide/workflows).

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./list-workflow-catalog-types.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./list-workflow-catalog-types.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
